description_long: This sculpture is a detailed bust of a bearded man, rendered in a rough, expressive style that emphasizes the texture of the hair and facial features. The head is slightly tilted, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and a full beard that merges into the neck and upper chest. The hair is curly and voluminous, with pronounced sculptural ridges and valleys, giving a sense of movement and vitality. The surface is matte and uneven, with visible tool marks and a hand-modeled appearance. The back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the mass and form of the head and shoulders. The overall coloration is a uniform gray, suggesting a material like plaster or stone.
description: A textured gray bust of a bearded man with curly hair, expressive facial features, and a rough, hand-modeled surface.
description_view_0: Right profile view showing the prominent nose, detailed beard, and textured hair.
description_view_1: Front-left angled view highlighting the facial features, deep-set eyes, and the expressive modeling of the beard and hair.
description_view_2: Left profile view focusing on the curly hair and the side of the face, with less emphasis on facial details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head with textured curls and the broad, unfinished back of the bust.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
